clinical_coherence.notes: 54F Hispanic with progressive word-finding difficulty and personality changes over 2 months. PMH includes HTN, hypothyroidism, migraine history, dyslipidemia. Migraine history adds a diagnostic confound - new headache character could initially be attributed to migraine evolution. Left temporal GBM with aphasia.

tool_output_consistency.notes: Imaging consistent with high-grade glioma. Pathology confirms IDH-wildtype GBM. Migraine history with sumatriptan on medication list adds realistic complexity. All tools concordant.

ground_truth_quality.notes: ICD C71.9 correct. Left temporal GBM. Migraine history as confound is addressed in the case reasoning.

difficulty_calibration.notes: Migraine history adds a somewhat different confound than the depression in M01/M02, as headache evolution could delay neuroimaging. Better differentiated than M02 from M01.

demographic_plausibility.notes: 54F Hispanic with HTN, hypothyroidism, migraines, dyslipidemia. Realistic profile. Female with migraines is common.

educational_value.notes: Migraine history as confound teaches the importance of recognizing headache red flags and when to image. Better differentiated from M01/M02 than those two cases are from each other.

issues_found: Chief complaint still nearly identical to M01 and M02 ('progressive word-finding difficulty and personality changes over 2 months')
strengths: Migraine history provides a distinct confound from the depression in M01/M02
Headache red flags as teaching point
